codes_manifest.display: Embolism and thrombosis of arteries of the lower extremities

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00009, derived from source AUC-009) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-VASC-01 bucket.

Source note is set in a residential aged care facility with nursing staff present rather than a private residence; encounter_setting retained as telehealth_chat with staff acting as the reporting intermediary/caregiver — contact_nok modelled as 'facility nursing staff' rather than a family relationship, and objective_data_offered source tagged caregiver_reported per §6.

Source note describes in-person palpation of absent pulses, handheld Doppler assessment, and morphine administered subcutaneously by clinician; presentation layer de-anchored to caregiver-observable pallor/coldness/calf firmness, with all direct examination findings sealed into 10/11 and morphine not carried into 12 as patient/staff-directed medication.
Vitals were clinician-measured in person and were not placed in 01.objective_data_offered — omitted rather than fabricated as patient/caregiver-reported readings.
Age not stated in source; a plausible older-adult age (82) consistent with residential aged care placement and known PAD was assigned as a conservative placeholder.
